changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/dispatch.rs:42-475

Coverage: 35.9% (60/167 lines)

Uncovered: 107 lines in execute_operation -- the main dispatch function that routes Operation structs to kanban context methods. This is the central command dispatcher and the single largest uncovered block.

What to test: Unit tests exercising each Operation variant through execute_operation -- add/update/delete/move/archive for tasks, tags, columns, swimlanes, actors, attachments, and board operations. Mock or use a temp KanbanContext.
